ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action taken during access (e.g., viewed, downloaded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
